concept.title: Discovery Phase
concept.shortdesc: Discovery scans the package in read-only mode and records observable structure, relationships, and invariant status.

conbody.p: Discovery is the first boundary in the migration pipeline. It scans maps, topics, and media files, extracts relationships, and writes inventory facts to discovery.json. Discovery does not apply transformation logic.

ul.li: Input: package root passed to discover --package.
Output: artifacts, relationships, summary, and invariants in discovery output.

section.title: Classification behavior
section.p: Discovery classifies artifacts from observed signals and plugin-contributed patterns. If discovery cannot prove a semantic role, it leaves classification empty instead of inventing one.

section.title: Invariant behavior
section.p: Discovery includes invariant status in the output payload. Use --fail-on-invariants when you want non-zero exit codes for invariant failures in CI or preflight checks.
